name: codemap
description: Interactive call graph + reading guidance for AI-generated code. Repo-level UML class graph with LSP-calibrated verification.

chatParticipants.name: codemap
chatParticipants.description: Generate an interactive UML call graph for your workspace

commands.name: scope
commands.description: Limit analysis to a subpath, e.g. /scope apps/api/src/Capture

commands.name: focus
commands.description: Re-expand the graph around a single class, e.g. /focus IngestUrlHandler

commands.name: why
commands.description: Explain why a node or edge is partial / unverified

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain unverified nodes in the current graph

codemap.maxSkeletonFiles.description: Maximum number of files the workspace scanner picks as skeleton for LLM analysis.

codemap.maxParallelAnalyzers.description: How many single-file analyzers run concurrently.

codemap.strictVerification.description: When true, unverified nodes are shown but not clickable.
